pilot_overview: This project has COMPLETED all main experiments. All pilot experiments (H9, H10) have been executed. No new experiments are needed. Remaining work is paper writing and figure generation.

completed_pilots.name: H9: Co-occurrence vs Absorption
completed_pilots.key_finding: Perfect negative correlation (r=-1.0) is tautological - p_11 + absorption_rate = 1.0 by construction
completed_pilots.notes: The operationalization was tautological. Would need independent co-occurrence measure from held-out corpus.

completed_pilots.name: H10: Random SAE Baseline Comparison
completed_pilots.key_finding: Random SAE shows 8x higher absorption than trained SAE (0.278 vs 0.034), opposite to prediction
completed_pilots.notes: The Chanin metric is not specific to learned structure. Trained SAEs reduce structural artifacts. This is the key H7 finding.

notes: All full experiments are completed. No new pilots needed. Focus should be on paper completion.
